output.code:
# Load the text
path = "/mnt/data/file-16t1ErQ1fE2P1rdRdNtqZz-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    text = f.read()

# For debug, print first 200 chars
print(text[:200])

# search for quoted occurrence
phrase = '"وَلَوْ كَانَ مِنْ عِندِ غَيْرِ اللَّهِ لَوَجَدُوا فِيهِ اخْتِلَافًا كَثِيرًا"'
indexes = []
start = 0
while True:
    idx = text.find(phrase, start)
    if idx == -1:
        break
    indexes.append(idx)
    start = idx + 1
indexes

inner_phrase_1 = 'وَلَوْ كَانَ مِنْ عِندِ غَيْرِ اللَّهِ لَوَجَدُوا فِيهِ اخْتِلَافًا كَثِيرًا'
spans1 = []
for idx in indexes:
    inner_start = idx + 1
    inner_end = inner_start + len(inner_phrase_1)
    snippet = text[inner_start:inner_end]
    match = snippet == inner_phrase_1
    spans1.append((inner_start, inner_end, match))
spans1

phrase2 = '"وَنُنَزِّلُ مِنْ الْقُرْآنِ مَا هُوَ شِفَاءٌ وَرَحْمَةٌ لِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَلا يَزِيدُ الظَّالِمِينَ إِلَّا خَسَارًا"'
indexes2 = []
start = 0
while True:
    idx = text.find(phrase2, start)
    if idx == -1:
        break
    indexes2.append(idx)
    start = idx + 1
indexes2

inner_phrase_2 = 'وَنُنَزِّلُ مِنْ الْقُرْآنِ مَا هُوَ شِفَاءٌ وَرَحْمَةٌ لِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَلا يَزِيدُ الظَّالِمِينَ إِلَّا خَسَارًا'
spans2 = []
for idx in indexes2:
    inner_start = idx + 1
    inner_end = inner_start + len(inner_phrase_2)
    snippet = text[inner_start:inner_end]
    spans2.append((inner_start, inner_end, snippet == inner_phrase_2))
spans2
